pattern: Examine each bit position independently: when the target bit is 0 both source bits must become 0 (each set bit costs one flip); when the target bit is 1 at least one source bit must be 1 (one flip suffices if both are currently 0).
hints: Process one bit at a time — the contribution of each bit position to the flip count is independent of all others.
If the target bit is 1, the corresponding OR bit is already satisfied unless both source bits are 0, which needs exactly one flip.
If the target bit is 0, the OR bit must become 0, so every set bit in either source costs one flip independently — two source-1 bits cost two flips.

edge_inputs.description: one bit differs in a and b from target
both a and b have bits set where c has zero bits
a and b equal c already
both bits set where c-bit is 0 — costs two flips not one
c larger than both a and b requiring flips to add bits
large values near the constraint maximum

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    return [rng.randint(1, 10**9), rng.randint(1, 10**9), rng.randint(1, 10**9)]
